fixture: manual 1-file smoke (class Foo / object Bar / trait Greeter / type Money)
notes: first real SemanticDB-mode P/R; tree-sitter extractor emits Const for `val secret` but SemanticDB emits Method (getter accessor) — kind mismatch is the dominant FP/FN source. Module FN: squeezy does not emit Module symbols for plain `package` declarations, only `package_object`. The bench-supplied smoke fixture under benchmarks/fixtures/scala/semantic-cases currently fails scalac with sealed-trait cross-file errors and an unresolved reference in Runner.scala; running the oracle against it forces the scan-only-fallback path until the fixture is repaired.

heuristic: fixture repair only: dropped `sealed` from Greeter trait so FriendlyGreeter can extend it across files; switched Runner import from `example.util.Names.*` to `example.util.*` so the top-level `defaultName` def resolves
notes: first multi-file SemanticDB baseline. Three FP/FN families: kind mismatches (Struct/Enum/Function/Const vs SDB's Class/Method), unindexed generated/ tree, and missing companion-object emissions for case classes & Scala 3 enums.

heuristic: extractor: skip val/var/given/nested-def whose immediate parent is a function or method (local bindings). bench scan: scala-specific symbol normalisation — Struct/Enum -> Class + companion peer, Variant -> Method, top-level Function -> Method, Const -> Method, Field dropped, src/generated/ excluded. oracle: skip $package synthetics, class-parameter getters (`Class#name.`), case-class generated names (apply/unapply/copy/_N/copy$default$N/product*), enum desugaring helpers ($new/$values/values/valueOf/fromOrdinal)
notes: recall hits 1.0; precision just below gate. Remaining FPs are (a) Field->Method getter peer for class params (SDB getter filtered, so squeezy's peer is uncompensated) and (b) hand-written `apply` on object Money emitted by squeezy but filtered as case-class synthetic on SDB side.

heuristic: bench scan: drop Field->Method peer (SDB already filters class-parameter getter, so adding a peer creates an unmatched FP); narrow case-class synthetic peers to just apply/unapply/toString (drop copy/copy$default$N/_N which SDB filters). oracle: take apply/unapply/toString off the synthetic-filter list (they can be hand-written; squeezy compensates via the peers on the case-class side). extractor: also emit a bare-name reference for the selector of `Receiver.Selector` so `reference_search('Alice')` matches `Names.Alice`. fixture: add `// @generated` marker to GeneratedGreeter.scala so the workspace classifier surfaces it under coverage_reasons.generated. spec: tighten `scala-given-emission` expected_contains to `Const:intOrd`
notes: gate green (P>=0.90, R>=0.75 floor cleared with margin). All nine smoke queries also satisfy expected_contains. squeezy_build_ms ~4 on this machine.
